## Summary

Describe the feature, fix, or security change.

## Target branch

- [ ] This feature branch targets `dev`.
- [ ] This promotion PR is `dev` → `staging`.
- [ ] This production PR is `staging` → `main`.

## Validation

- [ ] Type-check passes
- [ ] Lint passes
- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] Production build passes
- [ ] Authentication and role behavior tested
- [ ] Database migrations reviewed and tested outside production
- [ ] Preview or staging deployment tested
- [ ] Rollback plan documented

## Production impact

Describe user-facing impact, environment-variable changes, database changes, and any required deployment steps.
